mapper.sql: s.ai_suggestion_id AS aiSuggestionId, s.analysis_run_id AS analysisRunId, r.trip_id AS tripId, s.suggested_place_id AS suggestedPlaceId, s.suggested_place_name AS suggestedPlaceName, s.suggested_region_hint AS suggestedRegionHint, s.suggestion_type AS suggestionType, s.suggested_title AS suggestedTitle, s.summary, s.reason, s.schedule_date AS scheduleDate, s.start_time AS startTime, s.end_time AS endTime, s.day_no AS dayNo, s.sort_order AS sortOrder, s.status, s.applied_schedule_item_id AS appliedScheduleItemId, sv.vote_id AS voteId, s.created_at AS createdAt, s.applied_at AS appliedAt
mapper.select: SELECT FROM AI_SUGGESTION s JOIN AI_ANALYSIS_RUN r ON r.analysis_run_id = s.analysis_run_id LEFT JOIN AI_SUGGESTION_VOTE sv ON sv.ai_suggestion_id = s.ai_suggestion_id WHERE r.trip_id = #{tripId} AND s.ai_suggestion_id = #{suggestionId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT FROM AI_SUGGESTION s JOIN AI_ANALYSIS_RUN r ON r.analysis_run_id = s.analysis_run_id LEFT JOIN AI_SUGGESTION_VOTE sv ON sv.ai_suggestion_id = s.ai_suggestion_id WHERE r.trip_id = #{tripId} AND r.analysis_run_id = #{runId} AND s.status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY s.schedule_date, s.start_time, s.sort_order, s.ai_suggestion_id FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE AI_SUGGESTION SET status = 'APPLIED', applied_schedule_item_id = #{scheduleItemId}, applied_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ai_suggestion_id = #{suggestionId} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE AI_SUGGESTION SET status = 'REJECTED' WHERE ai_suggestion_id = #{suggestionId} AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT ai_suggestion_vote_id AS aiSuggestionVoteId, ai_suggestion_id AS aiSuggestionId, vote_id AS voteId, approve_option_id AS approveOptionId, reject_option_id AS rejectOptionId, resolution, resolved_at AS resolvedAt FROM AI_SUGGESTION_VOTE WHERE ai_suggestion_id = #{suggestionId}

SELECT ai_suggestion_vote_id AS aiSuggestionVoteId, ai_suggestion_id AS aiSuggestionId, vote_id AS voteId, approve_option_id AS approveOptionId, reject_option_id AS rejectOptionId, resolution, resolved_at AS resolvedAt FROM AI_SUGGESTION_VOTE WHERE vote_id = #{voteId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE AI_SUGGESTION SET status = 'VOTING' WHERE ai_suggestion_id = #{suggestionId} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE AI_SUGGESTION SET status = 'APPLIED', applied_schedule_item_id = #{scheduleItemId}, applied_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ai_suggestion_id = #{suggestionId} AND status = 'VOTING'
UPDATE AI_SUGGESTION SET status = 'REJECTED' WHERE ai_suggestion_id = #{suggestionId} AND status = 'VOTING'
UPDATE AI_SUGGESTION_VOTE SET resolution = #{resolution}, resolved_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE vote_id = #{voteId} AND resolution IS NULL
